"visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 18, 1440, 1009], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Instructions:
1. Sit astride on the chair, and set both hands to the occipital bone of your head, finger crossed.
2. Inhaling, erect your waist and back; exhaling, lower your head, with chin reaching as close as possible to the collarbone. Totally relax your neck and maintain the posture for 3 breaths.
3. Elbow inward, pinch your neck with your arms.
4. Up and down rub your neck with both hands for 12 to 18 times, smoothly breathing.

Functions: 
1. Helps alleviate neck pains; enhances the movement of your neck.
2. Helps stretch neck muscles thus to relief anxiety and stress.", "resource-id": "imoblife.stretchexercises.lite:id/actItemInfo", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "cce8ab4", "scrollable-horizontal": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"text": "Instructions:
1. Sit astride on the chair, and set both hands to the occipital bone of your head, finger crossed.
2. Inhaling, erect your waist and back; exhaling, lower your head, with chin reaching as close as possible to the collarbone. Totally relax your neck and maintain the posture for 3 breaths.
3. Elbow inward, pinch your neck with your arms.
4. Up and down rub your neck with both hands for 12 to 18 times, smoothly breathing.

Functions:
